name: Berkshire (United Kingdom)
description: A blue field with a white stag standing beneath a stylised oak tree.
history: Designed in 2017 by David Smith and chosen in a public competition; registered with the Flag Institute on 11 January 2017. The hart and oak refer to Windsor Forest and the historic arms of Berkshire.

features.symbolism: Windsor Forest and the Royal Oak
from the arms of Berkshire and the royal forest
